nation: Fort Good Hope Dene Community Council
economic_notes: KGDC owns 24.9% of Sahtu Dene Inn Limited Partnership which operates Sahtu Dene Inn (formerly Mackenzie Valley Hotel Ltd.) in Norman Wells, NT. KGDC is a government not-for-profit organization incorporated to pursue community economic development initiatives for Fort Good Hope, NWT.
notes: Disclaimer of opinion issued due to complete deterioration of internal controls - no SAO or Director of Finance for much of the year, bank accounts not reconciled, payroll issues, inadequate AP controls, missing council minutes. Financial statements are for year ended March 31, 2020 but audit report dated April 26, 2021. Prior year figures are restated. KGDC (K'asho Got'ine Development Corporation) is fully consolidated. Sahtu Dene Inn Limited Partnership is a GBE accounted for on modified equity basis. Equity in income from GBE was -$33,583 in 2020. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event in Note 13. Prior period adjustment of $85,101 noted in Note 12 relating to omitted investment and share of earnings in Sahtu Dene Inn Limited Partnership.
